notes: Section, , , , provided for payment to persons confined in a naval confinement facility under sentence of a court-martial of not more than $3 a month for necessary expenses, such payments to be made from appropriations for pay of Navy or Marine Corps.Pub. L. 87–64976 Stat. 480Sept. 7, 1962
